scripts.test:contracts: bun -e "const fs = require('fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const filters = [['packages/contracts/package.json', '@kclub/contracts'], ['packages/test-utils/package.json', '@kclub/test-utils']].filter(([path]) => fs.existsSync(path)).flatMap(([, name]) => ['--filter=' + name]); if (filters.length === 0) { console.log('No contract workspaces yet; skipping until Phase 2.'); process.exit(0); } const result = spawnSync('bun', ['x', 'turbo', 'run', 'test', ...filters], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: process.platform === 'win32' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
